delegations.task_goal: Implement the GH-105 / #94 read-only Task Thread batch for #105-#109 in the renderer using fixtures only.
read_scope: Existing smoke script and package scripts
non_goals: credential/cookie/profile/raw evidence/run truth/session truth/package truth persistence
GitHub, PR, commit, push, or Loom carrier writes
delegations.validation_expectation: Run npm run typecheck, npm run smoke, npm audit --audit-level=high, and git diff --check before handoff.
delegations.output_format: Short report with changed files, validation commands/results, boundary confirmation, and residual risks.
delegations.integration_target: Main controller integrates renderer diff, records build evidence, updates GH-105 recovery/status carriers, and creates the single GH-105 implementation PR.
delegations.integration_summary: Integrated renderer read-only task creation, Core-owned run navigation, outcome states, result/failure projections, direct Identity Runtime Session separation, and smoke coverage.

integrated_outputs.summary: Added read-only task creation, Core-owned run navigation, success/empty/partial/failure-safe/failure/unavailable/expired/redacted/unknown fixture states, structured result report, and direct Identity Runtime Session separation.

notes: Admission created via loom_flow.py work-item create --activate --init-recovery.
fact_chain.mode required the same minimal repair used for GH-101: set mode to work-item + recovery-entry + derived status-surface while keeping GH-105 entry_points unchanged.
Implementation remains fixture/API-shaped and does not add production Core/Harbor/Lode calls or #110-#113/#95 behavior.
